## Validation

- [ ] `npm run ci`
- [ ] `npm run smoke`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=low`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] API/browser matrix when applicable

## Reviewer Gate

- [ ] Permissions checked
- [ ] State machines checked
- [ ] Audit logs checked
- [ ] Unfinished scope not presented as complete
- [ ] Intent debt recorded for failures or external blockers
